chatPane.anchorJumpTitle: Jump to the corresponding line in code
chatPane.bulletAsk: ask a follow-up in natural language (or just type — treated as ask)
chatPane.bulletImprove: line-by-line code improvement suggestions (with importance scores)
chatPane.bulletReview: run an AI review; results land in the findings list
chatPane.clearConfirmMessage: Clear all PR Agent run history for the current PR? This affects only this PR and cannot be undone.
chatPane.concurrencyReached: Concurrency limit reached ({{n}} running at once). New tasks for this PR will be queued and run automatically once a slot frees up
chatPane.duplicateRun: /{{tool}} is already running or queued for this PR; do not trigger it again
chatPane.emptyFootNoPr: No PR selected: pick one from the list on the left first
chatPane.emptyFootWithPr: Type / in the input for command completion; Shift+Enter for a new line
chatPane.emptyInputHint: The input below accepts commands or natural language:
chatPane.emptyNeedLlmSub: Configure an LLM model to use /review, /describe and other capabilities. Basic features like PR sync are unaffected.
chatPane.emptyNotReadySub: Neither the embedded runtime nor a local CLI was detected. Open Settings to view detection details, then restart the app.
chatPane.noFindings: PR Agent finished without parsing any findings (e.g. /describe may return only a summary, or the parser skipped unrecognized sections). Expand the raw output above to check.
chatPane.placeholderNeedLlm: Configure an LLM model to enable
chatPane.placeholderNoPr: Select a PR to start a conversation
chatPane.placeholderReady: Type a question, or use / to pick a command (↑↓ for history)
chatPane.rejectFindingTitle: Reject this suggestion (will not be posted to remote)
chatPane.resizeInputTitle: Drag to resize input height (2-5 lines)
chatPane.scrollUpForOlder: Scroll up to load earlier history…
chatPane.stopTitle: Terminate the current PR Agent run (SIGKILL)

commentsPanel.deleteConfirmMessage: This will delete the comment on the remote and cannot be undone. Continue?
commentsPanel.empty: This PR has no comments yet

connectionForm.githubBaseUrlPlaceholder: Leave empty for github.com; for GHE enter the instance URL, e.g. https://ghe.example.com (/api/v3 optional)
connectionForm.gitlabBaseUrlPlaceholder: Leave empty for gitlab.com; for self-managed enter the instance URL, e.g. https://gitlab.example.com (/api/v4 optional)

diffSearchPanel.matchOverflow: …{{overflow}} more (too many matches in one file, showing first {{cap}})
diffSearchPanel.partialError_one: {{count}} file could not be searched (binary / too large / load failed)
diffSearchPanel.partialError_other: {{count}} files could not be searched (binary / too large / load failed)

diffView.blameChangeRangeTitle: This range was changed by this PR
diffView.deleteCommentModalMessage: This will delete this comment on the remote and cannot be undone. Continue?
diffView.deleteCommentTitle: Delete your own published comment (synced remotely)
diffView.diffRenderFailedHint: Switching files or retrying usually recovers. The underlying error has been logged to the console.
diffView.editCommentTitle: Edit your own published comment (synced remotely)
diffView.loadingContentHint: Reading git blob from the local mirror; large or binary files may be slower
diffView.noFileChanges: This PR has no file changes
diffView.noResultFromMain: No result returned from main process

draftZone.deleteConfirmMessage: This draft has content and cannot be recovered after deletion. Delete it?
draftZone.deleteEditTitle: Delete draft (confirms again if it has content)
draftZone.deleteTitle: Delete draft (local only, does not affect remote)
draftZone.emptyDraftHint: (Empty draft; click Edit to add content)
draftZone.publishEmptyTitle: Cannot publish an empty draft; click Edit to add content first
draftZone.publishFromEditTitle: Publish to the remote (Cmd/Ctrl+Enter; current content is auto-saved first)
draftZone.publishOneTitle: Publish this comment to the remote
draftZone.stashTitle: Stash changes (kept locally, not published; Esc does the same)

draftsPanel.deleteConfirmMessage: Delete this draft? It cannot be recovered after deletion.
draftsPanel.deleteTitle: Delete draft (local only, does not affect remote)
draftsPanel.emptyFiltered: No drafts match the current filter.
draftsPanel.emptyHint: No drafts for this PR yet. Hover the "+" on a line in the Changes view to create a comment draft, or turn AI suggestions (/review, /ask) into drafts from the Chat view.
draftsPanel.jumpToDiffTitle: Jump to the diff to see code context
draftsPanel.publishOneTitle: Publish this one (same path as the Publish button in the draft zone)

errors.authHint: Your Personal Access Token (PAT) may be expired or lack permissions; check it in Settings
errors.dnsHint: The hostname could not be resolved; check base_url / DNS / proxy
errors.missingCommitHint: The synced local mirror cannot find this sha; the remote may have been force-pushed. Delete the bare mirror directory and re-clone
errors.missingCommitRefHint: The PR's head / base sha is unreachable in the local bare mirror. This usually happens after upgrading from a partial clone to a full clone without rebuilding the old mirror, or when the PR's source branch was deleted or force-pushed. Delete this repo's bare mirror directory (`~/.code-meeseeks/repos/<host>/<proj>/<repo>/bare`) and re-select this PR to re-clone automatically
errors.missingCommitRefTitle: Local mirror is missing a commit referenced by the PR
errors.missingCommitTitle: Local mirror is missing this commit
errors.networkResetHint: The remote connection was reset or interrupted; please retry later
errors.notFoundHint: The remote could not find this resource; the PR may have been deleted or renamed
errors.pathMissingHint: Usually an edge case where a file was renamed/deleted then restored within the PR; blame being unavailable for such files is expected
errors.pathMissingTitle: Path does not exist at this commit
errors.refusedHint: The target port is not listening; verify base_url is correct
errors.timeoutHint: Unable to reach the remote; check your network / VPN / proxy

inlineCodeContext.expandTitle: Expand code around the anchored line

llmProfileForm.apiKeyOptionalPlaceholder: This provider needs no key (leave empty)
llmProfileForm.cliWarningPrefix: ⚠️ Filling in and enabling this profile authorizes Code Meeseeks to invoke the local
llmProfileForm.cliWarningSuffix: tool to perform review operations (running in a subprocess under your local login session). Make sure the command is installed and signed in.

anthropic.hint: Official Anthropic API; enter the model name directly (e.g. claude-opus-4-8); the anthropic/ prefix is added automatically

cli.hint: 🧪 Experimental: depends on the upstream CLI (e.g. claude / codex); its behavior may change with upstream releases — stability and continued availability are not guaranteed. Delegates review requests to a locally installed and authorized command-line tool to call the model, without connecting to the API directly or requiring a key; the tool manages its own model and quota. Filling in and enabling this authorizes invoking that command-line tool in a subprocess under your local login session.
cli.label: Local CLI

dashscope.hint: Alibaba Cloud DashScope OpenAI-compatible access; includes Qwen, DeepSeek-on-DashScope, etc. Generate the API Key in the DashScope console
dashscope.label: Alibaba Bailian (DashScope)

deepseek.hint: Official DeepSeek API; enter the model name directly; the deepseek/ prefix is added automatically

openai.hint: Official OpenAI API; leave Base URL empty to use the default endpoint

openai-compatible.hint: Any service implementing the OpenAI API protocol (vLLM / FastChat / self-hosted proxy …); Base URL is required
openai-compatible.label: OpenAI-Compatible

volcengine-ark.hint: Volcengine Ark OpenAI-compatible access; includes Doubao, DeepSeek-on-Ark, etc. Use the Ark endpoint id (ep-...) or a preset model name for the model
volcengine-ark.label: Volcengine Ark

mainPane.conflictTitle: The remote reports a merge conflict
mainPane.emptyNoConnectionsHint: Bottom-right "Settings" → "Edit config.yaml" to add a code platform connection
mainPane.emptySelectPr: ← Select a PR from the left
mainPane.emptySelectPrHint: Selecting one will auto-sync the local mirror and show a side-by-side diff
mainPane.mergeTitle: Merge this PR into the target branch
mainPane.openInBrowserTitle: Open the PR's remote page in your default browser
mainPane.ownPrReason: You can't review your own PR
mainPane.publishCommentsTitle: Publish {{n}} drafts to the remote in bulk

onboarding.cacheDirDesc: Location for local repo mirrors and worktrees — a rebuildable cache. The default is fine.
onboarding.cacheDirRestartNote: Changing the cache directory takes full effect after restarting the app.
onboarding.doneLead: Setup complete! Click the button below to enter the app — Code Meeseeks will start syncing PRs awaiting your review.
onboarding.llmIncompleteHint: Fill in the required fields, or click Skip
onboarding.llmSub: Once configured, you can use /review, /describe and more on PRs.
onboarding.platformIncompleteHint: Please fill in Name / Base URL / Token
onboarding.platformSub: Choose a platform and enter your connection details.
onboarding.welcomeLead: Just a few steps to connect your code platform.
onboarding.welcomePoint1: Connect your code platform and automatically sync PRs awaiting your review
onboarding.welcomePoint2: Optionally connect an AI model for one-click /review and /describe

publishReviewModal.allPublished: All drafts were written to the remote; the comment list will refresh immediately.
publishReviewModal.emptyState: This PR has no drafts pending publish.
publishReviewModal.jumpToDiffTitle: Jump to Diff to view code context
publishReviewModal.publishingMessage: Publishing {{n}} comments to the remote sequentially…
publishReviewModal.title: Submit comments

settings.agentDirHint: Holds SOUL.md / AGENTS.md / MEMORY.md / USER.md and a rules/ subdir (review rules).
settings.cacheDirHint: Location for local repo mirrors and worktrees; a rebuildable cache.
settings.cacheDirRestartNote: Changing the cache directory takes effect after restarting the app; existing content is not migrated automatically.
settings.checkUpdateTitle: Check GitHub for the latest version (detection only, no auto-install)
settings.cliExperimentalHint: Local CLI providers depend on upstream CLIs (e.g. claude / codex); their behavior may change with upstream releases — stability and continued availability are not guaranteed.
settings.connSaveHint: Please fill in Name / Base URL / Token
settings.connectionsEmpty: Not configured yet. Add a code platform connection to get started.
settings.connectionsHint: Only one connection can be active at a time.
settings.deleteConnectionConfirmMessage: Delete connection "{{name}}"? Takes effect after clicking Save in the footer.
settings.fillRequiredHint: Please fill in all required fields first
settings.languageHint: Switches the interface immediately; the AI reply language follows as well.
settings.llmEmpty: Not configured yet. Add one to enable PR Agent.
settings.llmHint: The active profile determines which model PR Agent calls.
settings.pollerHint: Interval for automatically checking PRs, an integer between 60 and 900 seconds.
settings.pollerRangeError: Polling interval must be an integer between 60 and 900 seconds
settings.proxyModalHint: HTTP proxy (outbound). When enabled, LLM calls, code platforms, and git (HTTPS) all go through the proxy; local addresses connect directly.
settings.proxyStatusHint: When enabled, LLM / code platform / git (HTTPS) traffic goes through the HTTP proxy.
settings.title: Settings
settings.updateAvailableLabel: ↑ New version v{{version}} · Go to download
settings.updateDisabledHint: Update checking is disabled in config (config.yaml `update.check_enabled`)
settings.updateDisabledTitle: Update checking is disabled in config

statusBar.autopilotOffTitle: AutoPilot is off — click to enable auto pre-review of new PRs
statusBar.autopilotOnTitle: AutoPilot is on — click to disable
statusBar.jumpHint: · click to jump to this PR
statusBar.jumpToPr: Click to jump to this PR
statusBar.llmNotConfiguredTitle: No LLM model configured; click to open settings
statusBar.prAgentExpandableTitle: PR Agent · {{running}} running · {{waiting}} queued · click to view
statusBar.updateAvailableTitle: New version v{{latest}} available (current v{{current}}) · click to download
